items.caption: A handwritten diet plan titled "mayo clinic diet" with a list of meals and warnings for the duration of two weeks. the diet plan outlines specific food items to be consumed at each meal, including fruits, vegetables, meats, and grains. the meals are organized by day of the week, with breakfast, lunch, and dinner options provided. the plan also includes a warning to not stay on the diet for more than two weeks and a note about weight loss expectations. the text is in black ink on a yellowed paper with some creases and stains, suggesting it is an old document.
